content: agent1: implementing case_sensitive param for groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby and do_groupby_async). Will touch that file's groupby-related code only.

agent1: heads up, I've already modified sync_do_groupby/do_groupby in src/jinja2/filters.py to add case_sensitive param (default False), and factored grouping logic into a new helper _group_by(value, expr, case_sensitive) right after do_groupby. If you're adding with_counts to the same functions, please add it as an additional keyword param alongside case_sensitive and extend _group_by accordingly rather than reverting my changes. My diff is in src/jinja2/filters.py around lines 1160-1245. Let me know if you want me to paste the exact diff.
